description_long: This jet ski features a sleek, angular design with a predominantly black body accented by bold yellow and silver panels. The front is sharply pointed, giving it an aerodynamic appearance, while the wings extend outward with a slight upward tilt, enhancing its futuristic look. The surface is smooth and hard, likely constructed from high-strength composite materials for durability and performance on water. The cockpit area is slightly raised, with what appears to be a single seating position and a streamlined handlebar section. The rear of the jet ski is wide, with dual exhaust ports and additional yellow accents, suggesting a powerful propulsion system. Overall, the design is modern and aggressive, suitable for high-speed urban water environments.
description: A sleek, angular black jet ski with yellow and silver accents, featuring a pointed nose, wide wings, and a streamlined cockpit.
description_view_0: Side-rear view highlighting the angular wings, yellow accents, and dual exhaust ports at the back.
description_view_1: Front view showing the pointed nose, wide wings, and central cockpit area.
description_view_2: Side-rear view from the opposite side, emphasizing the symmetry and sharp lines of the wings and body.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the broad back, dual exhausts, and the full span of the wings.
attribute_handlebar_design: The handlebar is integrated into the cockpit area, appearing angular and streamlined, with no visible grips or controls in the images.
attribute_seat_configuration: Single, central seat with a contoured shape, positioned in the middle of the jet ski, finished in a matching color scheme.
